services.label: Services
services.heading: What I Do /
services.intro: I build custom digital systems for businesses that are ready to grow. Whether you need a professional website, a booking system, a customer portal, or tools to automate daily operations, I create solutions that help your business run smarter, move faster, and scale with confidence.

items.title: Full-Stack Development
items.description: I build complete web applications and software systems—from business websites and dashboards to booking tools and custom platforms that support your daily operations.

items.title: System Consultant
items.description: I help business owners figure out what system they actually need, analyze workflows, and turn requirements into a clear digital solution that saves time and supports growth.

items.title: Business Website & Automation
items.description: I create professional websites and automation tools—from landing pages and forms to dashboards and integrations—that help businesses attract customers and run more efficiently.

works.label: Projects
works.heading: Selected Works /
works.intro: Practical digital systems built for businesses that need reliable tools, clear workflows, and room to grow.

items.name: UA Production System
items.description: This application solves the current production visibility problem by tracking every item produced from the production floor through packing, helping identify where item counts drop before final processing. It provides real-time order tracking so teams can monitor production progress, packed quantities, pending items, and shortages as they happen. The MVP includes production item tracking, real-time order status, warehouse selection, role-based access, admin user management, admin role management, permission controls, and a shared dashboard for monitoring operational activity. Supporting features such as secure login, session management, user invitations, and controlled navigation ensure the right people can manage production data while keeping accountability clear across the workflow.

items.name: UA Production and Inventory System Mobile App
items.description: This application ensures streamlined production and inventory operations by allowing teams to keep tracking, managing, and validating production data even without an active internet connection, while providing the same core functionality as the UA Enterprise Production and Inventory system.

items.name: King Pata POS
items.description: King Pata POS is a secure, branch-focused point-of-sale and order management system designed to streamline daily restaurant operations. It enables staff to process walk-in orders, manage online orders, verify payments, monitor active queues, and maintain accurate branch-level workflows in one centralized application. The system solves the problem of disorganized manual order handling by improving transaction accuracy, staff accountability, payment tracking, and operational visibility. With device verification, branch-based access control, and real-time order management, King Pata POS helps business owners run each branch more efficiently, securely, and professionally

items.name: Field Sales Automation
items.description: I built a Flutter-based field sales automation application that solves the challenge of limited visibility into field agent activity and customer visit compliance. Its core MVP focuses on tracking field agents’ progress and verifying whether they physically visited assigned customers through geolocation-supported check-ins and route activity monitoring. In addition to field tracking, the platform brings together operational workflows such as order taking, sales collection, bank deposits, remittance processing, and customer account management in one mobile system. This project reflects my ability to design practical business solutions that improve accountability, strengthen operational oversight, and support more efficient field execution.

items.name: Sales Order And Invoice System
items.description: The Sales Order and Invoice System is designed to streamline and improve the ordering and invoicing process for customers. It supports organizational approval workflows based on the specific requirements and specifications of the organization. With role-based access control (RBAC), users can securely manage tasks and permissions according to their assigned roles. This helps improve operational efficiency, accuracy, and control across the entire sales order and billing process.

about.tagline: I turn manual workflows into digital systems that save time.
about.bio: I build websites, dashboards, and automations that fit how your business works.
